name: @sendero/workflows
description: Sendero — first-class declarative agent workflows. Multi-step plans with branches, pauses (awaiting_approval, awaiting_user_reply), checkpoints (resume across deploys via Session), parallel fan-out, retries, and per-step meter attribution. Adapted from the POC demo-workflow pattern into a reusable runner consumed by /api/agent/dispatch, cron jobs, and the MCP surface.
